candidates.title: How Endava is redesigning software delivery around AI agents
candidates.summary: Learn how Endava is using AI agents, ChatGPT Enterprise, and Codex to accelerate software delivery, automate workflows, and build an AI-native culture across the enterprise.

candidates.title: Fundamental’s Large Tabular Model NEXUS is now available on Amazon SageMaker JumpStart
candidates.summary: In this post, we show you how to get started with NEXUS on Amazon SageMaker JumpStart, walk through the deployment process, and demonstrate how to run predictions against your enterprise datasets.

candidates.title: Reducing container cold start times using SOCI index on DLAMI and DLC
candidates.summary: In this post, we look at how to use SOCI on publicly available Deep Learning AMIs and Containers, when to use the various SOCI modes provided by the tool, and how to quickly and efficiently use this tool in your workloads today.

candidates.title: Is Silicon Valley ready to put robots in people’s homes? Hello Robot is.
candidates.summary: The California startup released the fourth-generation of its home assistance robot, Stretch.

candidates.title: Lovable signs multiyear deal with Google Cloud to up usage 5x, source says
candidates.summary: Lovable and Google signed an expanded multiyear deal that involves a 5x expansion of Lovable's footprint on Google Cloud, and expanded access to Anthropic Claude.

candidates.title: Dreaming: Better memory for a more helpful ChatGPT
candidates.summary: ChatGPT introduces a new memory system to better remember preferences, keeping context fresh and relevant across conversations.
